title: 384 Plate to 96 Plate
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol preps a 96 plate from a 384 source plate.
steps_raw: This protocol preps a 96 plate from a 384 source plate.
20, 2, 2, and 20ul are transferred from A1, A3, A5, A7 of the 384 plate to column 1 of the 96 plate.
Same volumes are transferred from A9, A11, A13, and A15 to column 2 of the 96 plate.
Steps 1 and 2 are repeated until the end of the plate is reached for that row to subsequent destination columns.
Steps 1, 2, and 3 are repeated for start wells A2, B1, and B2.
